title: Evolution Engine V1 — Phase 1 Foundation
summary: Phase 1 foundation of the GetPawsy Evolution Engine is live. Eleven ee_* tables, three evolution-* edge functions, one admin dashboard, all RLS- and grant-locked to admins + service_role. Zero edits to OAuth, Publisher, Guardian, CI Layer, Queue, Canary, Global Stop, or Recovery Engine.
modules_implemented: Module 7: Predictive AI (baseline linear model + ee_predictions)
non_regression_invariants: No writes from ee_* code paths to pcie2_publish_queue, pinterest_pin_queue, pinterest_connection, app_config, guardian_*, pcie2_ci_*, or any publisher table
No triggers added to existing tables
All ee_* tables: admin-read + service_role-all, no anon grants
Validation triggers used for time-window rule on ee_predictions (no CHECK constraints)

evolution-learning-ingest.note: pinterest_pin_performance columns to be widened in Phase 1.1 backfill; cold-start expected

evolution-predictive-score.note: global priors used while learning tables warm up

next_phase: Phase 2 — Evolution + Trend + Emotion + Image DNA + Experiment (modules 2,3,4,5,8). Awaiting approval.
